mapper.sql: id, site, sku, product_name, sku_level, profit_rate_30d, return_rate, overseas_onway, overseas_sellable, overseas_total, purchase_pending_delivery, local_sellable, local_onway, purchase_plan_qty, locked_qty, total_inventory, sales_7d, sales_30d, sales_90d, max_monthly_sales, overseas_sellable_sales_ratio, overseas_total_sales_ratio, total_inventory_sales_ratio, last_local_outbound_time, outbound_days, purchase_cycle_days, suggest_purchase_qty, max_monthly_replenish_qty, owner_name, calc_time

choose.otherwise: order by site asc, sku asc

mapper.select:
select
and current_flag = 1 and site = #{site} and sku like concat('%', #{sku}, '%') and product_name like concat('%', #{productName}, '%') and sku_level = #{skuLevel} and owner_name like concat('%', #{ownerName}, '%')

select distinct t.`${column}` from ebay_replenishment_snapshot t where t.current_flag = 1 and t.`${column}` is not null and t.`${column}` != ''
and t.`${column}` like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
order by t.`${column}` limit 50
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ebay_replenishment_snapshot ( site, sku, product_name, sku_level, profit_rate_30d, return_rate, overseas_onway, overseas_sellable, overseas_total, purchase_pending_delivery, local_sellable, local_onway, purchase_plan_qty, locked_qty, total_inventory, sales_7d, sales_30d, sales_90d, max_monthly_sales, overseas_sellable_sales_ratio, overseas_total_sales_ratio, total_inventory_sales_ratio, last_local_outbound_time, outbound_days, purchase_cycle_days, suggest_purchase_qty, max_monthly_replenish_qty, owner_name, calc_time ) VALUES ( #{site}, #{sku}, #{productName}, #{skuLevel}, #{profitRate30d}, #{returnRate}, #{overseasOnway}, #{overseasSellable}, #{overseasTotal}, #{purchasePendingDelivery}, #{localSellable}, #{localOnway}, #{purchasePlanQty}, #{lockedQty}, #{totalInventory}, #{sales7d}, #{sales30d}, #{sales90d}, #{maxMonthlySales}, #{overseasSellableSalesRatio}, #{overseasTotalSalesRatio}, #{totalInventorySalesRatio}, #{lastLocalOutboundTime}, #{outboundDays}, #{purchaseCycleDays}, #{suggestPurchaseQty}, #{maxMonthlyReplenishQty}, #{ownerName}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO ebay_replenishment_snapshot ( site, sku, product_name, sku_level, profit_rate_30d, return_rate, overseas_onway, overseas_sellable, overseas_total, purchase_pending_delivery, local_sellable, local_onway, purchase_plan_qty, locked_qty, total_inventory, sales_7d, sales_30d, sales_90d, max_monthly_sales, overseas_sellable_sales_ratio, overseas_total_sales_ratio, total_inventory_sales_ratio, last_local_outbound_time, outbound_days, purchase_cycle_days, suggest_purchase_qty, max_monthly_replenish_qty, owner_name, calc_time, batch_no, current_flag ) VALUES
( #{item.site}, #{item.sku}, #{item.productName}, #{item.skuLevel}, #{item.profitRate30d}, #{item.returnRate}, #{item.overseasOnway}, #{item.overseasSellable}, #{item.overseasTotal}, #{item.purchasePendingDelivery}, #{item.localSellable}, #{item.localOnway}, #{item.purchasePlanQty}, #{item.lockedQty}, #{item.totalInventory}, #{item.sales7d}, #{item.sales30d}, #{item.sales90d}, #{item.maxMonthlySales}, #{item.overseasSellableSalesRatio}, #{item.overseasTotalSalesRatio}, #{item.totalInventorySalesRatio}, #{item.lastLocalOutboundTime}, #{item.outboundDays}, #{item.purchaseCycleDays}, #{item.suggestPurchaseQty}, #{item.maxMonthlyReplenishQty}, #{item.ownerName}, NOW(), #{batchNo}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE ebay_replenishment_snapshot SET current_flag = CASE WHEN batch_no = #{batchNo} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
